nasb.text: The eunuch answered Philip and said, “Please tell me, of whom does the prophet say this? Of himself or of someone else?”

esv.text: And the eunuch said to Philip, “About whom, I ask you, does the prophet say this, about himself or about someone else?”

cnv.text: 太監對腓利說：“請問先知這話是指誰說的？指他自己呢？還是指別人？”

ccb.text: 太监问腓利：“请问先知是在说谁？在说他自己还是在说别人？”

csbs.text: 太监对腓利说：“请问，先知说的这话是关于谁呢？是关于自己，还是关于别人呢？”
